argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 15; const type = "{{ type }}" || 'all'; const wait = (ms) => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const inboxIcon = document.querySelector('[data-e2e="inbox-icon"]'); if (inboxIcon) inboxIcon.click(); await wait(1500); if (type !== 'all') { const tab = document.querySelector('[data-e2e="' + type + '"]'); if (tab) { tab.click(); await wait(1500); } } const items = document.querySelectorAll('[data-e2e="inbox-list"] > div, [data-e2e="inbox-list"] [role="button"]'); return Array.from(items).filter(el => el.textContent.trim().length > 5).slice(0, limit).map((el, i) => ({ index: i + 1, text: el.textContent.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ').substring(0, 150) })); }

description: Get TikTok notifications (likes, comments, mentions, followers)
name: Notifications

variables.name: type
variables.help: Notification type (all, likes, comments, mentions, followers)
